title: Twin-Wing Clifftop Estate in Lombok
blurb: A grand two-wing estate — effectively two villas in one — joined by a central social space, sleeping sixteen, with a dramatic central lap pool that angles out toward the horizon and stone-and-ironwood interiors.
detail:
A grand residence immersed in a privileged Lombok hilltop position, arranged as two wings joined by a central social area — effectively two villas in one — balancing luxurious living and world-class service with the island's lush nature.

With seven bedrooms, the estate hosts up to sixteen guests, ideal for a large gathering or two families: two exquisite master suites, four spacious guest bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, and a charming kids' room with custom-made bunk beds. The eastern wing features a large lap pool with a shallow section for children and a natural boulder cleverly integrated into the design.

Interiors showcase a sophisticated blend of natural stone-clad walls, recycled ironwood decks and pillars, timber panels and terrazzo bathrooms, with open-air showers and views that immerse you in nature. Two large kitchen and dining areas and a massive central living room set the scene for golden-hour gatherings, and from the living room the extraordinary central lap pool angles out from the villa — giving the sensation of floating toward the horizon.

features.l: Two-wing layout · two villas in one
